ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs the model was trained for */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used during training */,
  "optimization_method" TEXT /* Optimization method applied during training */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model used in the experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the experiment was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_experiment_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_type_id") REFERENCES experiment_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment this metric applies to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, researcher) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has admin privileges */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who conducted the experiment */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the experiment was run */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., completed, failed, in progress) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Detailed message about the log entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework used to build the model (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the model was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the model */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the model is active */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the model training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metrics" (
  "model_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model this metric applies to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric being recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the model metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the model metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment this result belongs to */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the experiment outcome */,
  "final_metrics" TEXT /* JSON object containing final metrics for the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the result was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the result was last updated */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Overall accuracy of the model */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score of the model */,
  "auc" REAL /* Area Under the ROC Curve (AUC) of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment this parameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the parameter was set */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user receiving the notification */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the notification was last updated */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the experiment type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the experiment type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)
